debug_info.goal:
P : Erdos392.Params
p : ℕ
hp : p ≤ Erdos392.Params.L P
⊢ ↑(Erdos392.Factorization.balance (Erdos392.Params.n P) (Erdos392.Params.initial P) p) ≥
    -↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) * Real.log ↑(Erdos392.Params.n P) -
      ↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) * ↑(Erdos392.Params.L P) ^ 2 * ↑(primeCounting (Erdos392.Params.n P))

failed_attempts: sorry
sorry

unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum
  simp only [Int.cast_sub, Int.cast_sum, Int.cast_natCast]
  have h_pos : (P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ (m.factorization p : ℝ))).sum ≥ 0 := by
    apply Multiset.sum_nonneg; intro x hx; obtain ⟨m, _, rfl⟩ := Multiset.mem_map.mp hx; positivity
  have h_le_n : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
    by_cases hp_prime : p.Prime
    · rw [Nat.factorization_def, padicValNat_factorial_le hp_prime]; omega
    · rw [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hp_prime]; simp; positivity
  sorry

unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum Params.initial
  simp only [Multiset.map_filter, Multiset.map_join, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_join, Multiset.sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul]
  let v := fun (m : ℕ) ↦ (m.factorization p : ℤ)
  let I := Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n
  have h_filter := Multiset.sum_map_filter_add_sum_map_filter_not I (· ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers) v
  have h_bal_I : (P.M : ℤ) * (I.map v).sum - (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≥ -↑P.M * Real.log P.n := by sorry
  have h_loss : (P.M : ℤ) * (I.filter (· ∉ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers)).map v |>.sum ≤ ↑P.M * ↑P.L^2 * ↑(primeCounting P.n) := by sorry
  rw [← h_filter, mul_add] at h_bal_I
  linarith

  rcases this with h_prime | h_not_prime
  · have h_bal : (Factorization.balance P.n P.initial p : ℝ) =

    have h_prime_count : 0 ≤ (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by positivity
    have h_v_p_n : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
      norm_cast; exact factorization_factorial_le_n p P.n
    sorry
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ h_not_prime]
    positivity

  have h_not_smooth : (P.M : ℝ) * (∑ m in I.filter (· ∉ S), (m.factorization p : ℝ)) ≤ P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by sorry
  linarith

  have h_pos : 0 ≤ (P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ (m.factorization p : ℤ))).sum :=

unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum Params.initial
  by_cases hp_prime : p.Prime; swap
  · simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hp_prime]
    positivity
  simp only [Multiset.map_filter, Multiset.map_join, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate,
    Multiset.sum_join, smul_eq_mul, Int.cast_sub, Int.cast_mul, Int.cast_sum]
  let I := Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n
  let I_s := I.filter (fun m ↦ m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers)
  let I_ns := I.filter (fun m ↦ m ∉ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers)
  have h_split : (I_s.map (fun m ↦ (m.factorization p : ℤ))).sum =
      (I.map (fun m ↦ (m.factorization p : ℤ))).sum - (I_ns.map (fun m ↦ (m.factorization p : ℤ))).sum := by
    rw [← Multiset.sum_map_add]
    refine Multiset.map_congr rfl fun x hx ↦ ?_
    by_cases h : x ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers <;> simp [h]
  rw [h_split, sub_mul, cast_sub, ← sub_add]
  have h_val_ns : (P.M : ℝ) * (I_ns.map (fun m ↦ (m.factorization p : ℤ))).sum ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting P.n) := by
    have h_m_ns : ∀ m ∈ I_ns, (m.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.L := fun m hm ↦ by
      have hm_pos := pos_of_ne_zero (Multiset.mem_Ico.mp (Multiset.mem_filter.mp hm).1).1.ne_zero
      exact (Nat.cast_le.mpr (Nat.factorization_le m p)).trans (cast_le.mpr ((Multiset.mem_Ico.mp (Multiset.mem_filter.mp hm).1).2.trans_le (P.hL.le.trans (by nlinarith [P.hL_pos]))).le)
    have h_card_ns : (I_ns.card : ℝ) ≤ (P.L : ℝ) * (primeCounting P.n) := by
      sorry
    sorry
  have h_val_main : (P.M : ℝ) * (I.map (fun m ↦ (m.factorization p : ℤ))).sum ≥ (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) - P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    sorry
  linarith
sorry

let n := P.n; let M := P.M; let L := P.L
  let S : Multiset ℕ := (replicate M (Multiset.Ico (n - n / M) n)).join
  have h1 : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p : ℤ)).sum = (S.map (·.factorization p : ℤ)).sum -
      ((S.filter (· ∉ (n / L).smoothNumbers)).map (·.factorization p : ℤ)).sum := by
    rw [Params.initial, ← Multiset.sum_add, ← Multiset.map_add, Multiset.filter_add_filter_not]
  have h2 : (S.map (·.factorization p : ℤ)).sum - (n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≥ - (M : ℝ) * Real.log n := by
    sorry
  have h3 : ((S.filter (· ∉ (n / L).smoothNumbers)).map (·.factorization p : ℤ)).sum ≤ (M : ℝ) * L^2 * primeCounting n := by
    sorry
  unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum; rw [h1]; push_cast; linarith

by_cases hp_prime : p.Prime
  · unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum Params.initial
    simp only [Multiset.map_filter, Multiset.map_join, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_join,

unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum initial
  simp only [Multiset.map_filter, Multiset.map_join, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_join, Multiset.sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul]
  set I := Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n
  set S := (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers
  have h_decomp : ((I.filter (· ∈ S)).map (·.factorization p)).sum = (I.map (·.factorization p)).sum - (I.filter (· ∉ S)).map (·.factorization p) |>.sum := by
    rw [← Multiset.sum_add_distrib, ← Multiset.map_add, Multiset.filter_add_not]
  rw [h_decomp, Int.cast_sub, Int.cast_mul, mul_sub]
  have h_part1 : (P.M : ℝ) * (I.map (·.factorization p)).sum - (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≥ - (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log P.n := by
    sorry
  have h_part2 : (P.M : ℝ) * (I.filter (· ∉ S)).map (·.factorization p) |>.sum ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
    sorry
  linarith

unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum Params.initial
  simp only [Multiset.map_filter, Multiset.map_join, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_join,
    Multiset.sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul, Multiset.map_id, Int.cast_sub, Int.cast_mul, Int.cast_sum]
  push_cast
  let I := Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n
  let S := (P.M : ℝ) * I.sum (fun m => (m.factorization p : ℝ)) - (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ)
  let T := (P.M : ℝ) * (I.filter (fun m => m ∉ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers)).sum (fun m => (m.factorization p : ℝ))
  have : (P.M : ℝ) * (I.filter (fun m => m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers)).sum (fun m => (m.factorization p : ℝ)) - (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) = S - T := by
    rw [← Multiset.sum_filter_add_sum_filter_not I (fun m => m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers)]
    simp only [cast_add, cast_sum, cast_mul]; ring
  rw [this]
  have hS : S ≥ - P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    sorry -- Legendre's formula estimation for the interval difference
  have hT : T ≤ P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
    sorry -- Sum of valuations for non-smooth numbers in the interval
  linarith
sorry

have h_bal : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≥ -(P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) := by
    unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum Params.initial
    simp only [Multiset.map_filter, Multiset.map_join, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_join,
      Multiset.sum_replicate, nsmul_eq_mul, Multiset.map_map, Int.cast_sub, Int.cast_mul,
      Int.cast_coe_nat, Multiset.sum_map_coe_nat, sub_le_sub_iff_right]
    exact Multiset.sum_nonneg (fun x hx ↦ by positivity)
  refine h_bal.trans ?_
  have h_fact_le : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
    have h_p : p = 0 ∨ p = 1 ∨ p.Prime := p.eq_zero_or_one_or_prime
    rcases h_p with rfl | rfl | hprime
    · simp
    · simp
    · rw [factorization_def hprime, padicValNat_factorial]
      have : ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k ≤
             ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / 2 ^ k := by
        refine Finset.sum_le_sum (fun k hk ↦ ?_)
        exact Nat.div_le_div_left (by linarith) (Nat.pow_le_pow_left hprime.one_lt.le _)
      refine (Nat.cast_le.mpr this).trans ?_
      simp only [Nat.cast_sum, Nat.cast_div, Nat.cast_pow]
      calc _ ≤ ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (Nat.log p P.n + 1), (P.n : ℝ) / 2 ^ k := by
          rw [Finset.sum_Ico_eq_sum_range]; simp; exact Finset.sum_nonneg (fun _ _ ↦ by positivity)
        _ ≤ (P.n : ℝ) * ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (Nat.log p P.n + 1), (1 / 2) ^ k := by
          rw [Finset.mul_sum]; simp [div_eq_mul_inv, inv_pow]
        _ ≤ (P.n : ℝ) * 2 := by
          refine mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ?_ (by positivity)
          rw [geom_sum_range]; linarith; norm_num
        _ ≤ _ := by nlinarith [show (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.M by sorry,
            show 0 ≤ Real.log P.n by sorry, show 0 ≤ (P.L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting P.n) by sorry]
  sorry
